name: System.Runtime.Caching
description:
Provides classes to use caching facilities.

Commonly Used Types:

System.Runtime.Caching.CacheEntryUpdateArguments

System.Runtime.Caching.MemoryCache
System.Runtime.Caching.ObjectCache
